'''''Queen of Taris''''' was a civilian [[Passenger liner/Legends|spaceliner]] that was active during the era of the [[Mandalorian Wars]] between the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] and the [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorian]] warrior clans. In [[3963 BBY]], ''Queen of [[Taris/Legends|Taris]]'' was present on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Serroco]] when it came under [[Battle of Serroco|attack]] by Mandalorians—the invaders devastated the world with [[Nuclear weapon/Legends|nuclear missiles]], and ''Queen of Taris'' was lost in the fighting. After the battle, ''Queen of Taris''{{'s}} destruction was noted in an [[The Admiral's List: Remember Serroco! Edition|edition]] of ''[[The Admiral's List]]'', an official publication issued by the [[Republic Navy/Legends|Republic Navy]].<ref name="serroco" />

==Behind the scenes==
''Queen of Taris'' was first mentioned in ''[[The Admiral's List: Remember Serroco! Edition]]'', an in-universe news report<ref name="serroco" /> appearing on the back page of [[Knights of the Old Republic 17|''Knights of the Old Republic'' 17]], written by [[John Jackson Miller]] and released in [[2007]].<ref name="kotor17">[[Knights of the Old Republic 17|''Knights of the Old Republic'' 17]]</ref>
